---
title: ""
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-banner">
  <h1>Methodology</h1>
  <p>How we source, clean, harmonise, and quality-assess health facility data</p>
</div>
```

## Overview

This page describes the end-to-end pipeline used to produce each country dataset.
The pipeline runs through four stages: **source collation → harmonization →
quality assessment → versioned release**. All pipeline code is open-source and
available in the [GitHub repository](https://github.com/myalla-christina/hf-data-portal).

---

## 1. Source Collation

### Primary Sources

| Country | Primary Source | Update Frequency |
|---|---|---|
| Tanzania | MOH Tanzania | Annual |
| Uganda | MoH Uganda HMIS | Annual |

### Secondary Sources

Where the MFL has coverage gaps we supplement with DHIS2 organisation unit exports,
WHO SARA surveys, OpenStreetMap for coordinate cross-validation, and HDX historical
snapshots.

---

## 2. Harmonization

### Common Schema

All datasets are transformed to a shared flat schema before analysis:

```
facility_id     character   Portal-assigned unique ID (ISO2_NNNNN)
source_id       character   Identifier in the original source
name            character   Facility name (original language)
facility_type   character   Hospital / Health Centre / Dispensary / Clinic / Other
ownership       character   Public / Private-for-profit / Faith-based / NGO
admin1          character   Province / Region
admin2          character   District / County
admin3          character   Division / Sub-county (if available)
admin4          character   Ward / Parish (if available)
longitude       numeric     WGS84 decimal degrees
latitude        numeric     WGS84 decimal degrees
coord_source    character   GPS / Geocoded / Centroid / Unknown
operational     logical     Operational at time of data extraction
year            integer     Reference year of the record
version         character   Portal dataset version
```




## 3. Quality Assessment

```{=html}
<div class="method-card">
  <h3>📍 Coordinate Validity</h3>
  <p>Proportion of records with non-missing GPS coordinates falling within the
  country boundary. Centroid-imputed coordinates are flagged separately.</p>
</div>

<div class="method-card">
  <h3>🗂 Attribute Completeness</h3>
  <p>Proportion of non-missing values per schema field, reported individually and
  as an overall completeness score (0–100).</p>
</div>

<div class="method-card">
  <h3>🔁 Duplicate Rate</h3>
  <p>Estimated proportion of duplicate records before and after deduplication
  using the name × coordinate matching procedure.</p>
</div>

<div class="method-card">
  <h3>📅 Temporal Coverage</h3>
  <p>Year range spanned by records, and the proportion of facilities with a
  recorded update date within the past 24 months.</p>
</div>

<div class="method-card">
  <h3>🏛 Administrative Consistency</h3>
  <p>Proportion of records whose admin1–admin2 codes are consistent with
  official GADM v4.1 administrative boundary files.</p>
</div>
```

---

## 4. Versioned Release

Datasets follow **semantic versioning** (`MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH`):

- `MAJOR` — schema-breaking changes
- `MINOR` — new facilities or additional fields (backward-compatible)
- `PATCH` — coordinate corrections or name fixes

---


```{=html}
<a href="about.html" class="btn-hf-primary" style="margin-top:1.2rem;display:inline-block;">About the Project</a>
<a href="roadmap.html" class="btn-hf-outline" style="margin-top:1.2rem;display:inline-block;">Roadmap</a>
```
